meaning: n.老化,成熟的过程v.使变老
examples: Too much protein in the diet may advance the aging process.
It occurs in elderly men, apparently as part of the aging process.
Scientists would soon be able to manipulate human genes to control the aging process.
In 2000, Team USA won with a group of players aging from 14 to 35.
That still leaves more than 55 million Americans who voted for the aging, outspent warrior, John McCain.
